result:
30/30 tests pass. Here's what was added:

- **`status`**: prints staged files from index (or `(none)`)
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`**: compares file lists by blob hash, reports Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`**: restores blobs to working directory, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`**: moves HEAD only, no working directory changes
- **`rm <file>`**: removes file from index, errors if not present
- **`show <hash>`**: displays commit metadata and files with two-space indent

The only compile fix needed was `find_files_section` — the two-clause version was `nondet`, replaced with an if-then-else to make it `semidet`.
